header.title: i18n System
header.description: Exhaustive guide to the internationalization architecture. Includes 11 configuration files and global type definitions.

config.title: i18n.config.ts
config.desc: Configuration core. All available namespaces are defined here, resources are registered, and base i18next parameters are configured.

checker.title: i18n.checker.ts
checker.desc: Control file for type safety. Ensures that Russian translations fully match the structure of English standards.

constants.title: i18n.constants.ts
constants.desc: Global system constants: list of supported languages, list of all namespaces, and metadata for structure visualization.

safety.title: Type Safety Layer
safety.desc: Automatic type generation based on JSON schemas. Missing key errors are detected at compile time.

checker.title: Checker Control
checker.desc: Localization completeness control mechanism. Prevents merge if not all strings are translated into target languages.
